metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for browser automation, layered E2E testing, and developer tooling

plugins.name: agent-web-interface
plugins.description: Semantic browser interface for LLM agents - token-efficient page snapshots via Puppeteer/CDP, with a skill for live page interaction

plugins.name: app-exploration
plugins.description: Shared live product exploration and evidence capture for downstream testing workflows

plugins.name: test-analysis
plugins.description: Shared coverage planning, test-case generation, and spec review grounded in exploration evidence

plugins.name: playwright-automation
plugins.description: Canonical Playwright execution layer for analysis, authoring, review, and flake repair

plugins.name: robot-automation
plugins.description: Robot Framework execution layer built on shared exploration and test-analysis plugins

plugins.name: site-knowledge
plugins.description: Site-specific automation patterns and knowledge for popular websites (Airbnb, Amazon, Apple Store)

plugins.name: md-export
plugins.description: Export markdown files to clean, dark-themed PDFs

plugins.name: web-bench
plugins.description: WebBench benchmark runner - executes real-world browser tasks from the Halluminate/WebBench dataset, scores via LLM-as-judge, and produces evaluation reports
